title: Tone Alignment
description: Does the response match our voice — warm, mission-driven, and authentic? Score 1 if it sounds corporate or cold; score 5 if it sounds like us.

title: Clarity
description: Is the message clear and easy to understand for our intended audience? Score 1 if confusing or jargon-heavy; score 5 if effortlessly readable.

title: Usefulness
description: Would we actually use this, with minimal edits? Score 1 if it needs a full rewrite; score 5 if it's nearly ready to publish.

title: Brand Fit
description: Does it reflect who we are and what we stand for? Score 1 if it feels generic or off-brand; score 5 if it feels unmistakably like Acme Nonprofit.

title: Call to Action
description: Is the call to action specific, compelling, and easy to act on? Score 1 if buried or weak; score 5 if clear, urgent, and motivating.

title: Risk / Appropriateness
description: Any statements that could be misleading, harmful, or create reputational risk? Score 1 if there are serious concerns; score 5 if completely safe.
